text_block_list.name: Player A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! They're... gonna get our flag! I-it's over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Frustrated screams echo throughout Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two teams are vying for victory in capture the flag. Unfortunately, it's
not looking so good for one team...

text_block_list.name: Player A
text_block_list.text:
Dang it, no matter how many times we try, we just can't get past their
defense! Like, they've got no weak points!

text_block_list.name: Player B
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, speaking of defense—look at ours! We're... doomed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Come on, team... Don't give up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, we've still got a chance! Defenders, listen up! Dig your
cleats in and make sure they don't push us any further back—I know
you have it in you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'll need three people confident in their strength to follow me.
We can't hold out forever, so we'll just have to bring the fight to
them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita, you're planning on charging through them head-on, right? If
anyone can do it, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I got this! I've been carrying portable shrines way heavier than
me since I was a kid! So check this out, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Everyone—chaaarge! Today will be our victory! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A miracle unfolds before my eyes. She breaks through the opposing defense before grabbing the flag and scoring. Now that's a comeback!

text_block_list.name: Player B
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Kitasan! Or should I say—our clutch captain?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! ♪ But I couldn't have done it myself. We won because
of everyone's hard work! Let's keep this up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer, I can't help but be entranced by her cheerful expression
and that determined look in her eyes—not to mention her natural
knack for leadership.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey hey, you're a trainer, right? You've got your eye on her,
don'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, Kitasan Black—or Kita, for short! I can't wait to see where
she'll go. Who would've thought she'd grow up to be such a leader?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, so you know who I am. Makes sense. You'd have to live under a rock to not recognize the Invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I wonder what kind of racer Kita will be. She used to always
say she wanted to be just like me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah! Teiooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Did you see me back there?! Did you see how I ran?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm still nowhere near your level, but I'm giving it my all every day so I
can make my debut!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm, that's the spirit! If you enter the tryouts, I'm sure you'll find a
trainer in no time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, speaking of, you must be a trainer. Nice to meet you—I'm
Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She deeply bows to me in greeting. Seems like she's got good
manners, too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, Teio! I'm entering an upcoming scrimmage, and my
childhood bestie Dia will be there too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We're running in different races, but we promised each other we'd
both win. So, um... would you want to come watch?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you betcha! But if I'm coming out to watch, then you better
show me some great running, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious myself, I make a mental note to go watch her at that
scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the scrimmage arrives.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can win—I've got this. All right, as long as I run with the pack, I'll
eventually overtake them...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what? Huh?! Nobody's... falling behind?! You're kidding
me—they're speeding up?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black frantically tries to catch up to the runners in front. In the
end... she finishes in third place.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan, nice going out there. We totally thought you had it in the
bag, though... Are you feeling under the weather?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? I really thought that was my race, too... Ah! Dia's race is about
to start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next race features Kitasan Black's childhood friend, Satono
Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So this... is the pace of Tracen Academy. It's about what we
expected. Wait for it, wait for it... Almost...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Now! This is my chance! Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond bursts forward. Right before the finish line, she pulls
slightly ahead and claims victory.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that, Dia?! Um, I mean, I'm happy that you won and all... But wasn't that different from how you usually run?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I totally flubbed up my own running, so I have to know—what's your
secret?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well... the races at Tracen Academy are far removed from the
amateur scene. I came in knowing that.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All I did was utilize what I learned from my family and coach. This is what've they've been preparing me for, after all.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We've all been working towards one dream—that one day, I'll win a
G1 race. And I don't plan on letting their efforts go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is our family's dream. Everyone's been waiting for this day—and
for all the races still to come—since long before I was even born.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's why I feel more relaxed now. I took my first step—made
my first ripple in this vast ocean that I must traverse.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (I always assumed... that we were the same...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(We were inseparable—playing together, competing with each other,
supporting one another... But...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I was wrong. Whenever it got dark and we said our goodbyes... Dia
was still putting in the work to improve herself afterwards.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Dia didn't just get lucky today. She and her family worked hard to
get here. That's why she won—and I...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Kitasan Black gritting her teeth in frustration as she gazes at the
sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet beneath her frustration, I can sense her determination and
strength of will.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I... didn't notice... at all. I didn't understand anything...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But... but... it's only uphill from here! Sure, I might've lost today, but—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Hey, aren't you that trainer from the other day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some strange reason—one that I can't even explain myself—I feel
like I have to say this now, or never.
choice_data_list: Please, let me be your trainer!
Please, let me be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whaaaaat?!
